headline: By This Metric, Exxon Passed Nvidia in March
summary: The S&P 500 energy sector has cooled off a bit in recent days. But it was the only grouping within the index to gain ground in March. One of the standouts among energy stocks was Exxon Mobil, which logged its best quarter on record.
